session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report results. Do NOT fix anything, just report.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci and report results

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 Building erkbot @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erkbot Downloading cryptography (4.3MiB) Downloading claude-agent-sdk (67.6MiB) Built erkbot @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erkbot Downloaded cryptography Downloaded claude-agent-sdk Installed 20 packages in 17ms make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1625 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
... [110 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
## make fast-ci Results
**Status: FAILED** (Exit code 2)
### Summary
The `make fast-ci` command failed due to Prettier formatting issues in 2 files. All other checks and tests passed successfully.
### Detailed Results
**Formatting Issues:** - **Prettier check FAILED** - Code style issues found in 2 files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Passing Checks:** - Linting: All checks passed - ruff format: 1625 files already formatted - Markdown check: Passed - Exec reference check: OK - ty (type checking): All checks passed - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md pairing: All 19 files properly paired
**Test Results (All Passed):** - erk unit tests: 5466 passed in 21.05s - erk-dev tests: 136 passed in 4.21s - erk-statusline tests: 112 passed in 0.83s - erkbot tests: 114 passed in 2.16s
### Issue
The build failed because Prettier detected formatting violations in the two markdown files listed above. These files need to be formatted with Prettier's --write flag to pass the check.
